creator: alexander@wittig.name
text:
Hello Eygene

When updating mail/exim to 4.73, could you maybe also have a look at 
ports/152962? I submitted it shortly before you became maintainer of 
mail/exim, so maybe it fell under the radar.
That PR applies to 4.72, but from your proposed patch it seems most of 
it would still apply to the new port.

Thanks,
Alexander
